message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam shadowing false

actor "Web User" as WebUser

boundary "index" as index
boundary "Main.view" as MainView
boundary "Image.View" as ImageView
control "ImageController" as ImageController
participant "DB" as DB
participant "DBE" as DBE
participant "ImageModel" as ImageModel
database "images" as imagesDB
artifact "Images" as ImagesArtifact

WebUser -> index : 1:Need to see some Pictures

index -> ImageController : 1:1 new ImageController( new DB ( DBE ) )
activate ImageController

ImageController -> DB : new DB ( BDE::MySQL)
activate DB

DB -> DBE : getDNS(); getUser(); getPass()
activate DBE
deactivate DBE

ImageController -> imagesDB : ImageController->fetchAll() : $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare(SELECT id,filename,title,description FROM images)
activate imagesDB
imagesDB <-> ImagesArtifact
deactivate imagesDB

ImageController -> imagesDB : ImageController->fetchAll() : $stmt ->execute()
activate imagesDB
imagesDB --> ImageController
deactivate imagesDB

ImageController ..> ImageModel : $results = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_CLASS, ImageModel::class)

ImageController --> index : 1:0|1|* $images array
deactivate DB
deactivate ImageController

index -> ImageView : render ()
activate ImageView
ImageView -> MainView : + layout
activate MainView
MainView --> ImageView
deactivate MainView
ImageView --> index
deactivate ImageView

index --> WebUser : he/she dont know how many work it was ;-)
@enduml
